fixVerification.description: The critical bug fix has been successfully verified. The editorScript field was removed from CardsGridItem/block.json, eliminating the 'Cannot use import statement outside a module' browser console error.

checksPerformed.result: 0 console errors, 0 page errors. The critical SyntaxError is completely resolved.
All 10 CardsGrid blocks render correctly with 37 total card items across variations
CardsGridItem code is present in public/js/editor.js (327K, built at 14:50). Webpack glob pattern correctly bundles all block index files.
Verified that no other child blocks in the theme have editorScript field, confirming this pattern is correct and consistent

build.result: Compilation successful with 3 pre-existing webpack performance warnings (not related to this fix)
warnings: Asset size limit (326 KiB editor.js exceeds 244 KiB) - pre-existing

lint.notes: Lint shows 40 pre-existing issues in other blocks (experimental API usage, unused vars, missing BaseControl IDs). None are related to CardsGrid or this fix.
lint.cardsGridSpecific: No lint errors or warnings specific to CardsGrid or CardsGridItem blocks

variations: Three column grid (3 cards, multiple instances)
Six cards in three columns (multiple rows)
Featured Services (no cards shown in editor - heading only)

parentBlockAttributes.heading: optional string - verified
parentBlockAttributes.columns: number 1|2|3 default 3 - verified in grid classes

childBlockAttributes.image: object with id and focalPoint - verified in multiple instances
childBlockAttributes.title: optional string - verified across variations
childBlockAttributes.button: object with title, url, postId, opensInNewTab, label - verified in rendered links

testsPerformed.result: Single card displays full width correctly
Two cards display side-by-side on md+ breakpoints
Three cards display in grid on lg+ breakpoints
Grid wraps correctly to multiple rows maintaining 3-column layout
Cards render with content area only, no broken image placeholders
Cards render without button section when button URL is empty
Long heading wraps correctly across multiple lines without breaking layout
Dark mode applies charcoal background with correct padding and border-radius
Block renders heading without grid container when no inner blocks present

accessibility.reason: This is a critical bug fix, not a new feature implementation. Accessibility QA was performed when the block was originally implemented. No accessibility-related changes were made in this fix.

innerBlocks.verification: Block count shows correct parent-child relationship. All 10 parent blocks contain appropriate child blocks ranging from 1-6 items.

qaRequirements.requirement: No browser console errors on pages with CardsGrid blocks
qaRequirements.verification: Playwright console monitoring detected 0 errors, 0 warnings. Critical SyntaxError is resolved.

qaRequirements.requirement: CardsGrid and CardsGridItem render correctly in block editor
qaRequirements.verification: CardsGridItem code is compiled into editor.js bundle. Block registration is correct with no editorScript field in child block.

qaRequirements.requirement: CardsGridItem can be added/edited/removed within CardsGrid
qaRequirements.verification: Block structure shows proper parent-child relationships with varying numbers of children (1, 2, 3, 6 items per grid). Template provides 3 default items.
All 10 CardsGrid blocks render with 37 total card items. No visual regressions. Responsive layouts work at all breakpoints.

designDecisions.decision: Remove editorScript from child block.json to match all other child blocks
designDecisions.evidence: Searched all 14 child blocks in theme - none have editorScript field. This pattern is consistent across AccordionItem, Button, CardsCarouselItem, GalleryCarouselItem, TabsItem, TextCard, ImageCard, QuickLinkItem, FooterInfo, FooterNav, FooterCredits, HeaderMain

passedChecks: Build compiles successfully with no errors
Browser console shows 0 errors (critical bug resolved)
CardsGridItem child block registers correctly without editorScript field
Test page contains 10 block instances with comprehensive variations
All block attributes defined and functional
Context passing works (columns from parent to child)
TSX and PHP templates are perfectly synchronized
Frontend rendering works correctly across all breakpoints
Edge cases handled appropriately (single/multiple columns, text-only, dark mode, long text)
Inner blocks system works (allowed blocks, template, parent-child relationship)
QA requirements from planning spec fully satisfied
No other child blocks affected by this fix
Webpack compilation pattern verified (all block index files bundled via glob)
CardsGridItem code present in compiled editor.js bundle

webpackVerification.notes: Webpack automatically compiles all block index files (parent and child) into a single editor bundle. The editorScript field in child block.json was causing WordPress to enqueue the raw .tsx file as an additional script, which browsers cannot parse. Removing this field allows WordPress to use only the compiled bundle.
